templates.description: Debian GNU Linux, or simply Debian, is a free and open source Linux distribution, developed by the Debian Project, which was established by Ian Murdock in August 1993.
Ubuntu is a free, open source operating system based on Debian Linux.
AlmaLinux is a distribution of the Linux operating system, also based on open source, derived from CentOS.
AlmaLinux is a distribution of the Linux operating system, also based on open source, derived from CentOS.
A fedora is a hat with a soft brim and indented crown. It is typically creased lengthwise down the crown and "pinched" near the front on both sides.
Ubuntu is a free, open source operating system based on Debian Linux.
Debian GNU Linux, or simply Debian, is a free and open source Linux distribution, developed by the Debian Project, which was established by Ian Murdock in August 1993.
Ubuntu is a free, open source operating system based on Debian Linux.
Debian GNU Linux, or simply Debian, is a free and open source Linux distribution, developed by the Debian Project, which was established by Ian Murdock in August 1993.
Rocky Linux is an open-source enterprise operating system designed to be 100% bug-for-bug compatible with Red Hat Enterprise Linux.

AlmaLinux is a distribution of the Linux operating system, also based on open source, derived from CentOS.

apps.description: Popular open-source CMS for websites and blogs.
A self-hosted team wiki & knowledge base.
A self-hostable platform to host apps and databases easily.
Version control & CI/CD platform.
Fast, modern, secure VPN.
A popular web hosting control panel.
Self-hosted collaboration platform for files, calendars, etc.
Proxmox Backup Server is an open-source solution for fast, secure, and deduplicated backups of virtual machines, containers, and servers.
Build with the precision of code or the speed of drag-n-drop. Host with on-prem control or in-the-cloud convenience.
HestiaCP is a free and open-source control panel that lets you easily manage web servers, domains, email, and databases through a simple web interface.
NocoDB is a free and open-source no-code database platform that transforms any database into a smart spreadsheet interface, allowing teams to collaborate and build applications without writing code.

Portainer is a free and open-source container management platform that provides a simple, intuitive web interface for managing Docker, Kubernetes, and Swarm environments, making container orchestration accessible to users of all skill levels.
EasyPanel for administration APPS in Docker
Run AI models like Llama, Mistral and Gemma on your server. OpenAI-compatible REST API. Complete privacy without external services.
Manage multiple Proxmox clusters from a single panel
Email security gateway protecting against spam, viruses and email threats
Open-source Firebase alternative with PostgreSQL database, authentication, real-time subscriptions, and storage.
Open-source Firebase alternative with PostgreSQL database, authentication, real-time subscriptions, and storage.
High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution
High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution
Uptime Kuma is an open-source, free and easy-to-use self-hosted monitoring tool. Uptime Kuma is compatible with multiple platforms including Linux, Windows 10 (x64) and Windows Server.
minikube quickly sets up a local Kubernetes cluster on macOS, Linux, and Windows. We proudly focus on helping application developers and new Kubernetes users.

Jellyfin is a Free Software Media System that puts you in control of managing and streaming your media. It is an alternative to the proprietary Emby and Plex, to provide media from a dedicated server to end-user devices via multiple apps.
Free and open source, powerful network-wide ads & trackers blocking DNS server.
MinIO AIStor delivers unmatched enterprise performance, scale, agility and economics for AI data, agentic computing, and analytics.
Grafana is an open-source analytics and visualization platform for monitoring and observability.
Streamline your operations with our all-in-one platform — perfect for managing projects, data, and system health with simplicity and efficiency.
A complete network performance monitoring solution with distributed agents, real-time metrics, and beautiful visualizations.
A self-hosted AI agent gateway with real-time messaging automation, secure device pairing, and a modern web-based Control UI.

environments.validation_message: Must be a valid OpenAI API key (starts with sk-)
Must be a valid Anthropic API key (starts with sk-ant-)
